title: erysimum pseudoturritis
intro: Erysimum pseudoturritis, also known as Turk's cap or Winter alyssum, is a biennial flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Erysimum pseudoturritis include its ability to reduce coughing and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in medicinal use.
